articles.title: Ladies’ first: Maiden batch of 9 from IMA now officers
articles.description: A historic moment unfolded at the Indian Military Academy as nine women officer cadets were commissioned for the first time, joining 515 graduating cadets. President Droupadi Murmu hailed the event as a significant step for women's empowerment and fostering international ties. Awards were presented to outstanding cadets, including Vishal Kumar for 'Best Overall Cadet'.

articles.title: Prakash Raj to join Cockroach Janta Party protest in Bengaluru today
articles.description: Actor Prakash Raj will join a protest in Bengaluru organized by the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) demanding Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation. The nationwide campaign highlights alleged examination irregularities and the "collapse of the education system," with similar demonstrations planned in other cities.

articles.title: 'He said ...': Gill reveals Rohit's reaction after costly mix-up in Afghanistan ODI
articles.description: Shubman Gill revealed Rohit Sharma was unbothered by their run-out mix-up in the first ODI against Afghanistan, brushing it off after seeing the replay. Gill's unbeaten 84 then steered India to a seven-wicket victory, overcoming a brilliant Gurbaz century and showcasing debutant bowlers' resilience.

articles.title: Why was IShowSpeed kicked out off FOX Sports set? Zlatan Ibrahimović humiliates streamer over Cristiano Ronaldo World Cup prediction
articles.description: IShowSpeed went viral during FIFA World Cup 2026 coverage after Zlatan Ibrahimović jokingly kicked him off the FOX Sports set for predicting Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal would win the tournament. Thierry Henry’s stunned reaction quickly became a meme online. Despite the playful dismissal, Speed doubled down on his support for Ronaldo. The streamer also grabbed attention after interviewing FIFA president Gianni Infantino during the tournament.

articles.title: 'You're getting discombobulated': 'Commander in Chief' Trump shares AI image of US troops advancing
articles.description: President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated military image on Truth Social, claiming a major breakthrough with Iran is imminent and a peace deal to prevent nuclear weapons will be signed Sunday. However, Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson stated an agreement is unlikely to be signed immediately, suggesting further negotiations are needed.

articles.title: BRICS adopts Indore Declaration; India to lead seed rights, digital agriculture initiatives
articles.description: BRICS nations have adopted the "Indore Declaration," pledging enhanced cooperation in agriculture and launching new initiatives like a global forum on farmers' seed rights and a digital agriculture network. These decisions, made under India's presidency, aim to strengthen food security, support small farmers, and promote sustainable farming practices across member countries.

articles.title: Hardeep Singh Puri says India has over 60 days of crude, gas stocks; rules out any energy supply crunch
articles.description: India assures ample energy supplies, with over 60 days of crude oil and natural gas reserves. Domestic LPG production has significantly reduced import reliance, ensuring 75-80 days of stock. Despite global price hikes due to the Iran conflict, India has kept domestic fuel prices stable, even seeing a slight decrease due to excise duty cuts.

articles.title: No fertiliser shortage for kharif, rabi crops; govt prepared for El Nino, says Shivraj Singh Chouhan
articles.description: Union Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan assured farmers that urea and DAP will remain affordable, with the government absorbing price increases. He stated India has sufficient fertilizer stocks for the current kharif season and is ensuring supplies for the upcoming rabi cycle. The minister also addressed El Nino concerns, highlighting adequate government preparations and international cooperation.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: NTA SWAYAM January 2026 admit card out at exams.nta.nic.in: Direct link to download hall ticket here
articles.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released admit cards for the SWAYAM January 2026 semester examinations, scheduled for June 17-21, 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website and must carry a printout to the exam center. The admit card is provisional and subject to eligibility verification.

articles.title: MP Police Constable Band recruitment 2026 admit card released for 679 posts: Direct link to download hall ticket here
articles.description: The Madhya Pradesh Police Department has released the admit card for the MP Police Constable Band Recruitment 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from June 12 to September 10, 2026, for the skill test and interview selection process. The admit card is mandatory for appearing in the examination stages.

articles.title: MPSOS Ruk Jana Nahi 2026 registration begins at mpsos.mponline.gov.in: Direct link to apply here
articles.description: The Madhya Pradesh State Open School has begun registrations for the Ruk Jana Nahi Scheme 2026 on its official portal, with applications open till June 20. The scheme allows Class 10 and 12 students who failed in one or more subjects or wish to reappear in the June 2026 cycle to apply, subject to eligibility and document verification.

articles.title: UP CNET result 2026 released at abvmucet26.co.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.description: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University has declared the UP CNET 2026 result for BSc Nursing admissions, activating the next phase of counselling. Candidates can download their scorecards from the official portal using login credentials. The result marks a crucial step in the admission process as merit lists and counselling schedules now take centre stage.

articles.title: Dwayne Johnson reflects on Oscar snub for 'The Smashing Machine'
articles.description: Dwayne Johnson, despite Oscar buzz for 'The Smashing Machine,' expressed disappointment at missing a Best Actor nomination. He views the snub as motivation, igniting a fire to pursue more challenging dramatic roles. Johnson's dedication to artistic growth is evident in upcoming projects with acclaimed directors, signaling a mature career evolution.

articles.title: Samyuktha Hegde SLAMS Pranit over Rs 370 biryani controversy
articles.description: Actress Samyuktha Hegde has firmly dismissed comedian Pranit More's apology in the wake of the Rs 370 biryani incident. She criticized his on-stage comments as perpetuating a culture of sexual violence, asserting that his regret lacked authenticity. The situation arose when an audience member felt entitled after purchasing biryani during More's performance, igniting a social media firestorm. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Prince Harry's reported clash with Queen Elizabeth II over the wedding
articles.description: Behind the fairy tale of Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's wedding, Queen Elizabeth II's confidante revealed significant pre-nuptial tensions. Lady Elizabeth Anson recounted a 10-minute heated exchange between Harry and the Queen over wedding plans, leaving the monarch deeply upset and feeling excluded. Despite later reconciliation, doubts about Meghan's suitability lingered.

articles.title: SSR's death anniversary: Sister Shweta pens emotional tribute
articles.description: On this poignant sixth anniversary of Sushant Singh Rajput's passing, Shweta Singh Kirti expressed her deep affection through a touching tribute. She celebrated his inquisitive spirit and unwavering kindness, emphasizing that the best way to remember him is by embodying his values. Read on to know more in detail.
